name: Embrace of the Tistina
name_jp: ティスティナの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>抱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>擁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a monster effect on the field: You can target that monster; change it to face-down Defense Position. During the End Phase: You can target 1 face-down Defense Position monster your opponent controls; take control of that monster. You can only use each effect of "Embrace of the Tistina" once per turn, and can only activate them while you control a "Tistina" monster with 3000 or more DEF.
eff: When your opponent activates a monster effect on the field: You can target that monster; change it to face-down Defense Position. During the End Phase: You can target 1 face-down Defense Position monster your opponent controls; take control of that monster. You can only use each effect of "Embrace of the Tistina" once per turn, and can only activate them while you control a "Tistina" monster with 3000 or more DEF.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
